2605.04962.title: TabEmbed: Benchmarking and Learning Generalist Embeddings for Tabular Understanding
2605.04962.paper_summary: Foundation models have established unified representations for natural language processing, yet this paradigm remains largely unexplored for tabular data. Existing methods face fundamental limitations: LLM-based approaches lack retrieval-compatible vector outputs, whereas text embedding models often fail to capture tabular structure and numerical semantics. To bridge this gap, we first introduce the Tabular Embedding Benchmark (TabBench), a comprehensive suite designed to evaluate the tabular understanding capability of embedding models. We then propose TabEmbed, the first generalist embedding model that unifies tabular classification and retrieval within a shared embedding space. By reformulating diverse tabular tasks as semantic matching problems, TabEmbed leverages large-scale contrastive learning with positive-aware hard negative mining to discern fine-grained structural and numerical nuances. Experimental results on TabBench demonstrate that TabEmbed significantly outperforms state-of-the-art text embedding models, establishing a new baseline for universal tabular representation learning. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/qiangminjie27/TabEmbed and https://huggingface.co/datasets/qiangminjie27/TabBench.
2605.04962.paper_summary_zh: 基礎模型已經為自然語言處理建立了統一的表徵，但這一範式在表格數據方面仍然大多未被探索。現有方法面臨根本性的限制：基於LLM的方法缺乏與檢索兼容的向量輸出，而文本嵌入模型則常常無法捕捉表格結構和數值語義。為了彌補這一差距，我們首先介紹了表格嵌入基準（TabBench），這是一個全面的套件，旨在評估嵌入模型的表格理解能力。接著，我們提出了TabEmbed，這是第一個將表格分類和檢索統一於共享嵌入空間的通用嵌入模型。通過將多樣的表格任務重新表述為語義匹配問題，TabEmbed利用大規模的對比學習，並結合正向意識的困難負樣本挖掘，以辨別細緻的結構和數值細微差別。在TabBench上的實驗結果顯示，TabEmbed顯著超越了最先進的文本嵌入模型，為通用表格表示學習建立了新的基準。代碼和數據集可在 https://github.com/qiangminjie27/TabEmbed 和 https://huggingface.co/datasets/qiangminjie27/TabBench 上公開獲取。
2605.04962.author: Minjie Qiang et.al.
2605.04962.authors: Minjie Qiang, Mingming Zhang, Xiaoyi Bao, Xing Fu, Yu Cheng, Weiqiang Wang, Zhongqing Wang, Ningtao Wang
